sentence: 他以观察员身份参加了会议。
pinyin: Tā yǐ guānchányuán shēnfèn cānjiā le huìyì.
english: He attended the meeting in the capacity of an observer.

meaning: 1. music played during a movie, play etc; 2. incidental music; 3. musi
sentence: 这部电影的插曲非常好听。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng de chāqǔ fēicháng hǎotīng.
english: The incidental music in this film is very pleasant to listen to.

sentence: 她在一家跨国公司上班。
pinyin: Tā zài yī jiā kuàguó gōngsī shàngbān.
english: She works at a multinational corporation.

sentence: 这台机器用液压系统控制。
pinyin: Zhè tái jīqì yòng yèyā xìtǒng kòngzhì.
english: This machine is controlled by a hydraulic system.

sentence: 新办公楼下个月就能用了。
pinyin: Xīn bàngōnglóu xià gè yuè jiù néng yòng le.
english: The new office building will be ready to use next month.
